title: Mike Harris
compiled_truth: Mike Harris is an Enron employee at [Enron](companies/enron). Over the corpus period (1999-10-04 to 2001-11-19), Mike Harris sent 3 and received 24 emails, totalling 27 interactions. Top correspondents: [Jeff Dasovich](people/jeff-dasovich) (2), [Dennis Benevides](people/dennis-benevides) (2), [Richard Shapiro](people/richard-shapiro) (2), [Mona Petrochko](people/mona-petrochko) (1), [Greg Cordell](people/greg-cordell) (1).
